findings.description: The URL for the administrative record is presented as plain text in the HTML, not as a hyperlink, matching the PDF's presentation. However, the email address on page 2 of the PDF shows 'caroline.bari@deq.nc.gov' while on page 1 it shows 'caroline.bari@ncdenr.gov'. The HTML preserves both variants accurately, so no fabrication, but the inconsistency is present in the source itself.
findings.evidence: Page 1 PDF: 'caroline.bari@ncdenr.gov'; Page 2 PDF: 'caroline.bari@deq.nc.gov'. HTML matches both.

findings.description: The sentence about the reinforced concrete cap appears incomplete in both the PDF and HTML, stating 'A reinforced concrete was installed.' which appears to be missing the word 'cap'. This is faithful to the source but worth noting.
findings.evidence: PDF: 'A reinforced concrete was installed.' HTML: 'A reinforced concrete was installed.'
